description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script which updates apt-get quietly, installs sqlite3, libsqlite3-dev and nodejs, prints the Ruby version and its location, and runs bundle install with parallel jobs using the FLAGS array. Define a single rspec job that executes the command bundle exec rspec. Use the default runner image (no explicit image), no explicit stages, caches, artifacts, or rules, and rely on the before_script for all setup steps.
